message:
fix(session): generation counter prevents clear/submitGoal race

The old submitGoal's finally block could clobber a newer run's
this.running and this.agent if /clear fired between two goals.
Add a runGeneration counter: each submitGoal increments it, and
the finally block only writes shared state when the generation
matches (no /clear started a newer run).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
